meta.title: La Pieve | Villas in the Tuscan countryside
meta.description: Six independent villas with private pools, set in fifteen hectares of olive grove and vineyard near Pisa, Tuscany.

hero.title: History in the heart of
hero.subtitle: Six independent villas with private pools, set in fifteen hectares of olive grove and vineyard near Pisa.

place.title: At the foot of Monte Serra
place.body1: La Pieve sits in the Val Graziosa, the quiet valley behind Calci. Fifteen hectares of olive trees and vines hold a soft microclimate, where lemons, oranges, peaches and figs ripen through the year.
place.body2: It is the kind of slow, open country that lets the city fall away. The houses are old, restored with care, and each one keeps its own piece of the land.

villas.title: The villas
villas.subtitle: Six restored houses, each independent, each with a private pool.

pool.title: Your own pool
pool.body: Each house has a private pool, never shared with the others.

independent.title: Independent houses
independent.body: Every villa stands alone, with its own entrance and outdoor space.

kitchen.title: A kitchen of your own
kitchen.body: A full kitchen or kitchenette in every house, so you cook as you please.

bathrooms.title: Ensuite bedrooms
bathrooms.body: Bedrooms come with their own private bathroom.

style.title: Old Tuscan character
style.body: Stone houses furnished in the traditional style of the region.

facilities.title: Modern comfort
facilities.body: Behind the old walls, the comforts you expect today.

location.title: Finding La Pieve
location.subtitle: Near Calci, a short drive from Pisa and the Tuscan coast.
location.fromPisa: From Pisa, head towards Calci and follow the valley road up to the church.
location.fromFlorence: From Florence, take the FI-PI-LI to Pisa Nord, then on towards Calci.
location.fromGenoa: From Genoa, leave the A12 at Pisa Nord and continue towards Calci.
location.parking: Parking is by the church, about twenty metres from the houses.

gallery.title: The place, in pictures
gallery.subtitle: Houses, pools and the land around them.

booking.title: Plan your stay
booking.body: Tell us your dates and the villa you have in mind. We answer every message ourselves.
booking.note: Booking is by email, so you always speak to us directly.

enquiry.intro: Send us your dates and we will come back to you with availability and a price.
enquiry.name: Your name
enquiry.weekHelp: Stays run Saturday to Saturday, one week at a time.
enquiry.fallback: Or write to us directly at

villaPage.bookBody: Check dates and availability for {name} by email.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We are glad to help with dates, directions and anything else.

footer.tagline: Six villas in the Tuscan countryside, near Pisa.
